title: Clean announce tests and verification
description: Update tests to use only independent test vector oracles from test/vectors/ccp9*.json and l2_payload.json. Remove any code-as-oracle tests. Add verification for cross-impl Rust/Python parity on announce packets. Ensure full coverage of spec pseudocode paths including error cases, TLV parsing.
close_reason: Refactored tests to vector oracles only; removed code-as-oracle ctor tests and all 'Why' comments; added parametrized parse/signed_data/error/TLV/Rust-subprocess/cross-parity tests with spec pseudocode coverage; updated test_l2_payload.py; pytest verified passing for affected tests. No impl files touched.
